issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase), not 'OnAttacked' (this card being attacked). Card activates during opponent's attack, not when attacked.

Missing conditional actions. DSL only has Rest action, but effect requires: optional opponent trash from Life, conditional opponent power reduction, and conditional action logic (if trash, then nothing; if no trash, then power reduction).
Missing duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' (text says 'during this turn' in opponent's turn context). Power reduction effect must be scoped to opponent turn only.
Rest action lacks 'optional' flag. Text says 'You may rest' indicating optional activation.
